no_dead_ends.evidence: Editorial workflow paths from feeds-to-drafts and generate-briefs into AdminStoryDrafts and on to published content have clear navigation and do not strand editors on dead-end screens.

loading_empty_error_states.evidence: AdminStoryDrafts implements loading skeletons, an EmptyDrafts component per status tab, and error/retry UI for failed loads.

cta_hierarchy_ok.evidence: Primary CTAs on AdminStoryDrafts are workflow actions (Approve, Reject, Publish); no mis-prioritized commerce or navigation CTAs appear on the editorial queue.

demo_live_labeling_ok.evidence: Editorial surfaces show only LIVE story_drafts sourced from feeds and AI briefs; there are no mis-labeled DEMO elements in the CMS editorial rail.

provenance_visible_or_linked.evidence: AdminStoryDrafts shows feed name and source URL for each draft; generate-briefs annotates SOCELLE Intelligence as source_name so editors can see editorial provenance.

a11y_smoke_ok.evidence: AdminStoryDrafts uses semantic headings, accessible buttons, and visible focus for key actions; no obvious keyboard or labeling regressions were introduced.

AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.description: Story drafts must accurately reflect upstream rss_items and market_signals for editorial reliability.
AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.query_or_function: feeds-to-drafts edge function and generate-briefs edge function insert paths

AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.description: Editorial queue integrity depends on story_drafts.status and reviewed_at/reviewed_by fields being correctly set during workflow transitions.
Publish RPC must create or update cms_posts consistently when drafts are approved and published.
Suggested products on story_drafts must map to real products for monetization surfaces.
AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.query_or_function: product id lookup in generate-briefs function

FE_template_auditor.description: AdminStoryDrafts should use shared EmptyState patterns for empty queues.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Localized copy explaining editorial queue behavior; keep Pearl Mineral tokens and spacing scale.

FE_template_auditor.description: Loading skeletons in AdminStoryDrafts need to respect existing Skeleton/StatCard visual language.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: List-shaped skeletons are acceptable; keep neutral graphite overlays and animation.

Journey_QA_specialist.issue_or_risk: Editors must be able to navigate from the drafts queue back to other CMS admin hubs and published content views without dead ends.

Journey_QA_specialist.component_or_page: Edge functions and admin CMS hub
Journey_QA_specialist.issue_or_risk: Signals and RSS items promoted into story_drafts should appear predictably in the queue, with clear status changes as editors take action.
